termsAndConditions.title: Complete Farmer Simple Farm Grower Agreement ("Agreement")

sections.title: Parties & Scope
sections.content: Complete Farmer LTD, a Ghanaian Limited Liability Company located at 11 Molade – Akiwumi Street, Airport West, Accra ("Complete Farmer") and (Michael Essien), located at (Haatso) with (Idon'tknow) having (Ialsodon'tknow) number and (Idon'tknow) (IDK). The Grower and Complete Farmer are hereinafter sometimes referred to collectively as the "Parties" and individually as a "Party." This Agreement relates solely to the Produce listed in Schedule A, grown on the Land using Production Method Standards in Schedule C, and the Grower represents and warrants that it has all necessary title under Ghana's laws to cultivate and prepare the Produce.

sections.title: Duration/Term
sections.content: This Agreement shall start on the (23 October 2023) which shall be the first day of the Growing Period, (23 October) and shall remain in place until the last day of the Growing Period unless this Agreement has been terminated earlier in accordance with its terms.

sections.title: Quality Specifications
sections.content: Grower agrees to comply strictly with the quality Specifications and standards for the Produce as detailed in Schedule B. Complete Farmer may verify and control quality at its expense. The Parties agree that only Produce that meets the Specifications shall be sold on the Complete Farmer Platform. The Grower shall comply strictly to the Production Method Standards outlined in Schedule C of this Agreement. A breach of the Production Method Standards shall be treated as a material breach entitling Complete Farmer to terminate this Agreement without notice.

sections.title: Obligations of Complete Farmer
sections.content:
Complete Farmer may provide the services below to the Grower:

i) Training to facilitate the Grower's capacity to produce the quality and quantity of Produce required

ii) Extension and supervision services

iii) Fulfillment Center for the produce

iv) Packaging material for the produce

v) Lending of Input on terms

vi) Any other services that Complete Farmer in its sole discretion decides to provide.

sections.title: Obligations of the Grower
sections.content:
The Grower shall:

i. Pay Complete Farmer the Fees for the services under this Agreement.

ii. Cultivate the crops in accordance with the Production Method Standards.

iii. Permit Complete Farmer or a third party authorised by Complete Farmer to inspect the Produce at the place of Delivery.

iv. Describe the Produce's quality and quantity to Complete Farmer at Delivery.

v. Deliver the Produce in the packaging as prescribed by Complete Farmer.

vi. Any other services that Complete Farmer may reasonably require for the Grower to perform for this Agreement.

sections.title: Obligations of Grower
sections.content:
At the end of the Growing Period, Complete Farmer will notify the Grower of the harvest date and handle the packaging and delivery of the Produce in accordance with this Agreement.

The Grower must deliver the Produce to a designated Fulfillment Center within three (3) days of harvesting. The Grower may request pickup from their farm by Complete Farmer for an additional fee to be deducted from the agreed Fees for the Grower in the PO.

After harvesting, the Grower will have three (3) days to transport the Produce to a designated harvest centre/(fulfilment centre). The Grower may ask Complete Farmer to pick up the Produce for a fee.

The Grower shall describe in writing the Produce's quality and quantity to Complete Farmer at Delivery to demonstrate their conformity with the Specifications.

Complete Farmer or a third party auditor at its request shall inspect the Produce with the Grower present at the Delivery location within three (3) days of Delivery. Complete Farmer shall bear the cost of the inspection.

Complete Farmer shall indemnify Grower for any losses resulting from delayed inspection after giving notice to conduct an inspection. If the Produce deteriorates due to delayed inspection, the Grower's indemnity will not exceed the Price.

The Grower may monitor the inspection and receive a copy of the findings on the Complete Farmer Platform and at the Fulfillment Center if it is available.

If there is a disagreement over test results during an inspection, both Parties will conduct further testing on other samples. The results of the second inspection will be final and the Party that disputed the first results will pay for the additional testing.

Complete Farmer shall reject Produce that does not conform with the Specifications upon inspection.

The Grower may present rejected Produce again within two days after rejection. The Grower understands that Complete Farmer may reject Produce in the second presentation if it fails to meet the agreed quality standards.

If Complete Farmer rejects any Produce meeting the Specifications, the Grower may sell it to a third party.

Complete Farmer shall pay for any rejected Produce that loses quality due to delays caused by their rejection.

If the Grower uses the rejected Produce for animal feed or for other purposes, the amount received by the Grower shall be deducted from the Price.

Complete Farmer may reject Produce without penalty or payment if the Grower violates the Production Method Standards or does not meet the Specifications.

Complete Farmer shall accept Delivery of the Produce, provided it meets the agreed Specifications and Production Method Standards, and inspection tests.

Title and risk to the Produce pass to Complete Farmer upon accepting Delivery.

Complete Farmer understands that Force Majeure events may affect the quantity of Produce (and shall accept the quantity that meets the Specifications at a prorated Price).

If the Grower delivers less than the agreed minimum quantity of Produce for any reason apart from a Force Majeure event, Complete Farmer will be entitled to compensation from the farmer.

sections.title: Price, Payment Terms and Mode of Payment
sections.content: Complete Farmer shall pay the Grower the Price for all Produce accepted by Complete Farmer under this Agreement after acceptance of the Produce within three (3) working days via (i) letters of credit, (ii) post-dated checks, or (iii) direct bank/mobile transfer within ten (10) working days. Both parties shall prepare a report to confirm the produce delivered and services provided. Complete Farmer and the Grower will countersign the appropriate documents. Both Parties will create a report to confirm the Delivered Produce and Complete Farmer's Services. Complete Farmer and the Grower will sign this report and the payment receipt as acknowledgment of receipt. If Complete Farmer makes a delayed payment to the Grower, the delayed payment will attract a 5% interest for each week of delay and Complete Farmer will reimburse the Grower for all costs and losses related with the delayed payment. For purposes of this clause a week shall be considered as Monday to Friday.

sections.title: Insurance
sections.content: Both Parties agree that the Grower shall obtain insurance for any potential losses and risks including non-performance, weather, pest/disease, and war. The insurance premium shall be paid by the Grower which premium shall be reimbursed by Complete Farmer upon the completion of the sale of the Produce.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: Complete Farmer may terminate this Agreement if the Grower commits a Material Breach of any term in this Agreement and where such breach is remediable does not remedy it within thirty (30) days of being notified in writing. The Grower may terminate this Agreement during a Growing Period if Complete Farmer fails to meet its obligations under this Agreement within thirty (30) days of being notified in writing to do so. Either Party may terminate this Agreement by giving at least thirty (30) days, at any time other than in the Growing Period. No funds will be reimbursed for termination outside of the Growing Period.

sections.title: Obligations of Complete Farmer
sections.content:
Complete Farmer may provide the services below to the Grower:

i) Training to facilitate the Grower's capacity to produce the quality and quantity of Produce required

ii) Extension and supervision services

iii) Fulfillment Center for the produce

iv) Packaging material for the produce

v) Lending of Input on terms

vi) Any other services that Complete Farmer in its sole discretion decides to provide.

sections.title: Indemnity
sections.content: Both Parties agree to indemnify, defend and hold each other harmless against any third-party claims, expenses, liabilities, and damages arising from their performance or breach of this Agreement. This obligation will survive the termination of this Agreement.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
sections.content: In the event of Dispute, either Party shall provide written notice with details and supporting documents to the other Party and both Parties shall endeavour to settle the Dispute amicably. If both Parties are unable to settle the Dispute amicably within sixty (60) days of service of the Dispute Notice then the Dispute shall be finally settled by an arbitrator appointed in accordance with the Alternate Dispute Resolution Act, 2010 (Act 798). The language of the arbitration shall be English and the venue shall be Accra, Ghana. The Parties may, by written agreement, waive reference of any Dispute to arbitration under this so that the dispute may be adjudicated by a court of competent jurisdiction or a mediator under a mediation process.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Both Parties agree that they will not be liable for various types of losses or damages suffered by the other Party except for specific circumstances such as fraud, intentional misconduct, death, property damage, bodily injury, property damage, intellectual property infringement, indemnification obligations, or breach of confidentiality. For general liability, except for the circumstances mentioned, the maximum amount a Party can be held liable for is limited to one times (1x) the total amount paid or payable under the Agreement in the twelve months before the event that led to the liability.

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.content: The Grower acknowledges and represents that he has read, understood, and agrees to be bound by the Online Terms which are incorporated into this Agreement by reference. In the event of any conflict between this Agreement and the Online Terms, this Agreement shall prevail. By opening an account on the Complete Farmer Platform, Grower acknowledges that he fully understands the terms of this Agreement.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: Notices must be in writing and may be delivered by hand, post, or via email to the address provided in this Agreement. Delivery by hand is considered received upon receipt, while email notices are considered received 24 hours after transmission.

definitions.definition: means any information disclosed by the disclosing Party to the recipient Party, which, (i) if in written, graphic, machine readable, or other tangible form is marked "Confidential" or "Proprietary" or which, if disclosed orally or by demonstration, is identified at the time of disclosure as confidential; or (ii) by the nature of the circumstances surrounding the disclosure, ought in good faith to be treated as confidential, including any business, financial, marketing, operational, sales, technical, and similar data of the disclosing Party that is not generally known or made available outside of the disclosing Party, whether or not such data is marked or disclosed as confidential.
means any dispute, controversy, misunderstanding or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement or the performance, validity or enforceability of it.
means written notice of the Dispute, setting out its nature and full particulars.
means the fees stated in the Purchase Order.

means circumstances beyond the control of a party including but not limited to acts of God, perils of the air, fire, flood, drought, pandemics, epidemics, explosion, sabotage of farm crop or produce storage and transportation, accident, riot, war, coup d'état, civil commotion or breakdown of equipment, which directly prevents a party from performing its obligations under this Agreement.
means a Complete Farmer designated location to receive, inspect and package Produce.
means the period from [date to date]
means seeds, seedlings, agrochemicals and fertilizer
means the parcel of land located at [insert longitude and latitude location of the land], in [Town/City] in the [Region] of the Republic of Ghana.

means a breach (including an anticipatory breach) that is serious in the widest sense of having a serious effect on the benefit which the terminating party would otherwise derive from a substantial portion of this Agreement.
means Complete Farmer's Privacy Policy, available at [link], and (ii) Grower Terms of Service, available at [link].
means the fixed price per hundred (100) kilograms of produce based on the amount agreed in the Purchase Order.

means Complete Farmer's standards, procedures and instructions, and guidelines for, preparation, and cultivation of Produce, including but not limited to modes of tilling, weed control, chemical and fertilizer application, pest and disease management, harvesting and post-harvest management outlined in Schedule C of this Agreement.
means the document in Schedule A which will describe the Order, the work to be done, the Produce to be supplied, and the Fees for such Order.
